global_description: Small freshwater fish with a streamlined, elongated body, vibrant orange or gold scales, flowing fins, and a fan-shaped tail. The body is covered in shiny, metallic scales, and the fins are delicate and translucent.

part_details.body: Streamlined, elongated with vibrant orange or gold metallic scales
part_details.tail: Fan-shaped, often with a flowing appearance
part_details.scales: Shiny, metallic, covering the entire body
part_details.eyes: Round, prominent, located on the sides of the head

spatial_relations: Fins extend from sides and back of body
Tail positioned at rear of body
Eyes located on sides of head
